name: prompt-yourself-obsidian-plugin
description: Build dependencies for the Prompt Yourself Obsidian plugin

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m 'chore: bump to %s' && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m 'chore: bump to %s' && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m 'chore: bump to %s' && git push --tags
